titles.title: A bill to amend title 5, United States Code, to ensure that Federal employees are fully informed of their whistleblower rights.
Whistleblower Anti-Gag Act of 2026
Whistleblower Anti-Gag Act of 2026

action.text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs.

committee.name: Senate Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs
